hero.subhead: Upload a selfie, pick a scenario, and our AI does the rest. In 30 seconds you'll have a video realistic enough to make your friends double-take.
hero.mockupCaption: Real demo: real Unsplash photo + fal.ai · 30 seconds

caseStudies.title: 5 real pranks made with Pranko
caseStudies.subtitle: Each card is a real Unsplash photo pushed through fal.ai. Hover to play the AI result.

cs1.title: Beat-up Rolex
cs1.desc: Unsplash: a beautiful expensive watch. fal.ai: same watch, destroyed.
cs1.story: Send it to your boss right before the client meeting. 'My car's been broken into, what should I do?'

cs2.title: CEO to homeless
cs2.desc: Unsplash: a well-dressed businessman. fal.ai: same man, down on his luck.
cs2.story: Show up to your ex's wedding as the 'guest speaker'. Watch the room lose it.

cs3.title: Grandma breakdancing
cs3.desc: Unsplash: a fragile 80-year-old grandma. fal.ai: her dancing to MJ.
cs3.story: Send it on the family WhatsApp group at 7am. Mom will screenshot it before breakfast.

cs4.title: Speedometer to 180
cs4.desc: Unsplash: a car dashboard. fal.ai: POV of driving like a maniac.
cs4.story: Text your roommate: 'bro I think I'm being chased' with the video. They will absolutely lend you their car.

cs5.title: Tidy → house-party aftermath
cs5.desc: Unsplash: a clean living room. fal.ai: same room, post-party chaos.
cs5.story: Send to your crush the night before they were going to visit. 'So… about tomorrow.'

cta.title: Ready to cause chaos?

create.promptLabel: What should happen in the video?
create.promptPlaceholder: e.g. make me win the lottery on live TV, make me dance like nobody's watching at a wedding, make me get chased by a giant penguin
